performance_overview: Through 9 sessions (inception 2026-06-01) Bull has completed only 3 trades and 0 clean signal-driven wins: trade 1 = 06-04 MPC long (-0.25%, stopped ~1 min after entry on a too-tight ultra-low-ATR stop), trade 2 = 06-05 corrective buy-to-cover of the unintended -18 MPC short from the 06-04 double-sell (+0.54%), trade 3 = 06-10 CIEN long (-1.68%, a failed-bounce stop-out ~21 min after entry). The win-rate buckets are still pure noise (1-2 genuine signal trades). Today (06-11) was a disciplined NO-TRADE cash day: Bull flat $0.00 / 0.00% while SPY rallied +1.77%, so -1.77% relative on the day. Cumulative since inception: Bull -0.0766% vs SPY -2.67% -- still ahead, but the gap narrowed sharply from ~-4% as today's SPY rally exposed the cost of sitting in cash on strong up days. Trend over last 5 sessions: four flat no-trade days, one small losing trade (CIEN), then today flat again -- selectivity remains the only realized edge, but it is increasingly a cash-drag edge rather than a trading edge.
overnight_hold_insights: Still ZERO genuine overnight holds completed across all 9 sessions. The overnight_holds.closed_eod bucket reads 3 trades / 1W / 33.3% / avg -0.58% but is contaminated -- all three are intraday/EOD closes (06-04 MPC long, 06-05 corrective short-cover, 06-10 CIEN stop-out), none a real carry-overnight outcome. No gap-risk data exists yet. Carry-decision policy unchanged: apply the 6 config safe-hold gates (profitable, trailing stop active, price > EMA-21, no earnings within 2 days, sentiment not negative, gap-risk cushion). Standing lesson: low-ATR or red/gap-down names that don't extend within the session are correctly closed/stopped rather than carried.
recent_market_context: 2026-06-12 premarket: VIX 19.04 (eased back under 20 after the whipsaw week), SPY regime trending_up but EMA structure still narrow (EMA9 740.92 vs EMA21 740.80, +0.02%). KEY CHANGE vs prior two sessions: the tape is GREEN -- 21 of 25 watchlist names up vs prev_close, led by a coherent large-cap storage/semiconductor/data-center cluster (SNDK +14.6%, TSEM +10.6%, TER +9.7%, FSLR +8.8%, TTMI +8.6%, WDC +7.9%, STX +6.4%, GLW +5.1%, NVDA +2.2%). Watchlist SOURCE still the generic Zacks/S&P/monthly-gainer momentum boilerplate (no fresh dated catalysts) so single-name sentiment quality unchanged, but for the first time in three sessions the price action confirms the names. Moderate-to-constructive momentum environment; first genuinely tradeable setup since CIEN (06-10).
notes_for_next_session: FOR THE FRI 2026-06-12 3:45 PM EOD AGENT: (a) ONE open position — WDC, 8 sh @ $563.73, protective stop @ $561.53 (initial 1.5xATR). Entered 12:35 PM as the green-day re-entry the AM agent flagged: at the open WDC failed only macd_hist_rising; by midday that flipped True with RSI 63.98 (<75), rel_vol 1.05 (>1.0), EMA9>EMA21, price well above EMA-200 and +0.95% over VWAP — clean 7/7 qualifier, the first in three sessions. (b) WATCH THE STOP: WDC ATR is low (~0.2-0.26% of price) so the stop sits only ~0.4% below entry — same too-tight-stop hair-trigger that scratched MPC (-0.25%). If it gets knocked out on intraday noise that's an expected small scratch, not a thesis failure. (c) trailing_stop_active is still false and partial_sold false — the +2 ATR partial target is ~entry+2*1.4667 = ~$566.66; trailing activates at +1.5 ATR. (d) OVERNIGHT CARRY DECISION: apply the 6 safe-hold gates. WDC: positive sentiment, no earnings blackout, price>EMA-21 at entry — but only carry if it's profitable, trailing stop is active, and it survives a 5% adverse gap above the stop at EOD; otherwise close it (the standing low-ATR/doesn't-extend lesson). (e) No other entries — every other quality-cluster name failed a gate at midday (FIX/SNDK/STX MACD not rising; TER/TSEM/GLW rel_vol<1.0; NVDA/FSLR EMA9<EMA21). Entry window now closed (after 1:00 PM). (f) CODE BUG STILL OPEN since 06-04: protective stop fills are not always written to trade_log.jsonl — if WDC's stop triggers before EOD, reconcile the exit into trade_log before update_memory runs (this exact bug masked the CIEN 06-10 stop).
